meta.project: Mohamed Aathil | Full Stack Developer Portfolio

product_overview: A single-page personal portfolio that presents Mohamed Aathil’s profile, skills, projects, education, certifications, resume, and contact options through smooth scrolling sections and animated UI. It helps visitors quickly explore professional background and reach out via the contact form or social links.
core_goals: Explore Mohamed Aathil’s professional background and technical skills
Review featured projects and open project-related external links
Send a message through the contact form or use social/contact links
Navigate quickly between portfolio sections on a single scrolling page
Switch between dark and light themes

features.name: Loader / Splash Screen
features.description: An animated loading screen appears briefly on initial page load before the portfolio content is revealed.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Wait for loader animation to complete -> See the portfolio content appear

features.name: Theme Toggle (Dark/Light Mode)
features.description: A global theme switch lets the visitor toggle between dark and light appearance across the portfolio.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click theme toggle button in the navbar -> See the page switch between dark and light mode
Navigate to / -> Click theme toggle button in the navbar again -> See the page switch back to the previous theme

features.name: Navbar Navigation
features.description: A sticky navigation bar provides smooth scrolling access to all main portfolio sections and supports mobile navigation.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click a section link in the navbar -> See the page scroll smoothly to the corresponding section -> Observe the active section highlighted in the navbar
Navigate to / -> Click the logo in the navbar -> See the page scroll back to the hero section
Navigate to / -> Click the hamburger menu on mobile -> See the navigation drawer open -> Click a section link -> See the page scroll to that section

features.name: Hero Section
features.description: The landing section introduces Mohamed Aathil with animated roles, call-to-action buttons, social links, and resume access.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the hero section -> Observe the animated role text cycle through developer titles
Navigate to / -> Click View My Work -> See the page scroll to the Projects section
Navigate to / -> Click Contact Me -> See the page scroll to the Contact section
Navigate to / -> Click the GitHub social link -> See the GitHub profile open in a new tab
Navigate to / -> Click the LinkedIn social link -> See the LinkedIn profile open in a new tab
Navigate to / -> Click Download Resume -> See the resume file download

features.name: About Section
features.description: The about area presents a personal bio, profile highlights, and animated achievement counters.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the About section -> See the section animations play -> View the bio text and stat counters

features.name: Skills Section
features.description: A categorized skills area lets the visitor filter technologies by discipline and inspect the displayed skill set.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Skills section -> Click a category tab -> See the skills update to that category
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Skills section -> Click different category tabs -> See the visible skill set change accordingly

features.name: Experience Section
features.description: A work history timeline presents professional experience details and the technologies used in that role.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Experience section -> See the experience timeline animate into view -> View the role, company, duration, description, and tech stack

features.name: Projects Section
features.description: A filterable projects grid showcases featured work with descriptions, technology stacks, and external links.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Projects section -> Click the All filter -> See all projects displayed
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Projects section -> Click a project category filter -> See only projects matching that category
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Projects section -> Open a project card -> View the title, description, and technology badges
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Projects section -> Click the GitHub link on a project card -> See the project repository open in a new tab
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Projects section -> Click View Live on an available project -> See the live project open in a new tab

features.name: Education Section
features.description: The education timeline shows academic background, including degree details, institution, duration, grades, and coursework.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Education section -> See the education timeline animate into view -> View the degree and academic details

features.name: Certifications Section
features.description: A grid of certifications displays credential details and provides verification links for each certificate.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Certifications section -> See the certification cards animate into view -> View the title, issuer, and date for each certification
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Certifications section -> Click Verify on a certification card -> See the verification link open in a new tab

features.name: Resume Section
features.description: The resume section provides a preview of the resume and an option to download the PDF version.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Resume section -> View the resume preview
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Resume section -> Click Download Resume -> See the resume PDF download

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: The contact section includes contact details, social links, and a form for sending a message by email.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Contact section -> Fill in Name -> Fill in Email Address -> Fill in Subject -> Fill in Message -> Submit the form -> See a toast notification after submission
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Contact section -> Leave a required field empty -> Submit the form -> See the form validation prevent submission
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Contact section -> Click the email link -> See the mail client open
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Contact section -> Click the GitHub social icon -> See the GitHub profile open in a new tab
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the Contact section -> Click the LinkedIn social icon -> See the LinkedIn profile open in a new tab

features.name: Scroll Progress Bar
features.description: A thin progress indicator at the top of the page reflects how far the visitor has scrolled through the portfolio.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll down the page -> See the progress bar fill as the scroll position changes

features.name: Side Links
features.description: Fixed side links provide quick access to social profiles and email from the viewport edge.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click the GitHub side link -> See the GitHub profile open in a new tab
Navigate to / -> Click the LinkedIn side link -> See the LinkedIn profile open in a new tab
Navigate to / -> Click the email side link -> See the mail client open

features.name: Footer
features.description: The footer displays copyright information and provides a shortcut back to the top of the page.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the bottom of the page -> View the footer copyright information
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the bottom of the page -> Click back to top -> See the page scroll to the top

routes.description: Single-page portfolio application with all sections on one scrollable page

features.name: Loader / Splash Screen
features.description: Animated loading screen that plays on initial page load before revealing the portfolio
user_interactions: Wait for loader animation to complete
Loader exits and portfolio content becomes visible

features.name: Theme Toggle (Dark/Light Mode)
features.description: Toggle between dark and light mode via a navbar button, persisted in context
user_interactions: Click theme toggle button in the navbar
Page switches between dark and light mode

features.name: Navbar Navigation
features.description: Sticky top navigation bar with links to all portfolio sections and theme toggle
user_interactions: Click nav link to scroll to corresponding section (About, Skills, Experience, Projects, Education, Certifications, Resume, Contact)
Observe active section highlighted in navbar
Click hamburger menu on mobile

features.name: Hero Section
features.description: Full-screen landing section with name, animated roles, tagline, CTA buttons, and social links
user_interactions: View animated role text cycling through Full Stack Developer, Java Developer, Software Developer
Click View My Work button to scroll to Projects section
Click Contact Me button to scroll to Contact section
Click GitHub or LinkedIn social link
Click Download Resume button

features.name: About Section
features.description: Personal bio, stats counters (years experience, projects, technologies, certifications), and profile highlights
user_interactions: Scroll to About section to trigger animations
View animated stat counters
Read bio text

features.name: Skills Section
features.description: Filterable skills display organized by category tabs (Programming, Frontend, Backend, Database, Tools)
user_interactions: Click category tab to filter skills (Programming, Frontend, Backend, Database, Tools)
View skill icons with hover animations

features.name: Experience Section
features.description: Professional experience timeline showing internship at VDart with role, period, description and tech stack
user_interactions: Scroll to Experience section to trigger entrance animations
View experience card with role, company, duration, and tech stack

features.name: Projects Section
features.description: Filterable project cards grid with category filtering, GitHub links, and feature lists
user_interactions: Click filter button to filter projects by category (All, Full Stack)
View project card with title, description, tech stack
Click GitHub button on a project card to open GitHub profile
Click View Live button (disabled if no live URL)

features.name: Education Section
features.description: Education timeline showing B.E. Computer Science Engineering degree details
user_interactions: Scroll to Education section to trigger animations
View degree, institution, period, grade, and courses

features.name: Certifications Section
features.description: Grid of certification cards with issuer, date, and verify links
user_interactions: Scroll to Certifications section to trigger card animations
View certification title, issuer, and date
Click Verify button on certification card

features.name: Resume Section
features.description: Resume download section with embedded resume viewer/download button
user_interactions: Scroll to Resume section
Click Download Resume button to download PDF
View resume preview

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Contact section with email/location info, social links, and a form that sends messages via EmailJS
user_interactions: Fill in Name field
Fill in Email Address field
Fill in Subject field
Fill in Message field
Click Send Message button to submit form
See success or error toast notification after submission
Click email link to open mail client
Click GitHub social icon
Click LinkedIn social icon

features.name: Scroll Progress Bar
features.description: Thin progress bar at top of page indicating scroll position
user_interactions: Scroll page to see progress bar fill

features.name: Side Links
features.description: Fixed social and email links on the side of the viewport
user_interactions: Click GitHub side link
Click LinkedIn side link
Click email side link

features.name: Footer
features.description: Page footer with copyright info and back-to-top functionality
user_interactions: View footer with name and copyright
Click back to top link

known_limitations.issue: Contact form uses placeholder EmailJS credentials (YOUR_SERVICE_ID, YOUR_TEMPLATE_ID, YOUR_PUBLIC_KEY) so email submission will fail
known_limitations.impact: Form submission will always throw an error in the current state; tests should verify form UI interactions, validation and toast notifications

known_limitations.issue: Resume PDF is served from /resume.pdf in public folder — download may return 404 if PDF is missing
known_limitations.impact: Download resume button may fail to download actual file

known_limitations.issue: Verify buttons on certification cards link to
known_limitations.impact: Verify links do not navigate to real credential pages
